hooks.command: if [ -f .dev-workflow/workflow.config.yaml ]; then echo 'dev-workflow: configurado (.dev-workflow/workflow.config.yaml). Skills: /task, /code-review-task, /docs-sync.'; elif [ -f .claude/workflow.config.yaml ]; then echo 'dev-workflow: configuracao legada detectada (.claude/workflow.config.yaml) — rode /setup-project para migrar sem apagar o arquivo antigo.'; elif [ -d .git ]; then echo 'dev-workflow: instalado mas NAO configurado — rode /setup-project.'; fi
